Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion

Class ParquetOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.ParquetOptions.Builder
Enclosing class:
ParquetOptions
public static final class ParquetOptions.Builder extends Object
Builder for ParquetOptions.

    Allow single-file parallelism for writing.

    Set the bloom filter false positive probability.

    Set the bloom filter number of distinct values.

    Enable or disable bloom filter on write.

    Set per-column options.

    Set the compression codec (e.g., "SNAPPY", "GZIP", "ZSTD", "LZ4", "BROTLI").

    Set the created_by string in the Parquet metadata.
    ParquetOptions.Builder

    Set the data page row count limit.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    dataPagesizeLimit(Long dataPagesizeLimit)
    Set the data page size limit in bytes.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    dictionaryEnabled(Boolean dictionaryEnabled)
    Enable or disable dictionary encoding.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    dictionaryPageSizeLimit(Long dictionaryPageSizeLimit)
    Set the dictionary page size limit in bytes.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    encoding(String encoding)
    Set the encoding (e.g., "PLAIN", "RLE", "DELTA_BINARY_PACKED").
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    maximumBufferedRecordBatchesPerStream(Long maximumBufferedRecordBatchesPerStream)
    Set the maximum buffered record batches per stream.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    maximumParallelRowGroupWriters(Long maximumParallelRowGroupWriters)
    Set the maximum parallel row group writers.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    maxRowGroupSize(Long maxRowGroupSize)
    Set the maximum row group size.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    skipArrowMetadata(Boolean skipArrowMetadata)
    Skip writing Arrow schema metadata.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    statisticsEnabled(String statisticsEnabled)
    Set the statistics level (e.g., "none", "chunk", "page").
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    writeBatchSize(Long writeBatchSize)
    Set the write batch size.
    ParquetOptions.Builder
    writerVersion(String writerVersion)
    Set the Parquet writer version (e.g., "1.0", "2.0").

    • compression

      public ParquetOptions.Builder compression(String compression)
      Set the compression codec (e.g., "SNAPPY", "GZIP", "ZSTD", "LZ4", "BROTLI").

    • writerVersion

      public ParquetOptions.Builder writerVersion(String writerVersion)
      Set the Parquet writer version (e.g., "1.0", "2.0").

    • encoding

      public ParquetOptions.Builder encoding(String encoding)
      Set the encoding (e.g., "PLAIN", "RLE", "DELTA_BINARY_PACKED").

    • statisticsEnabled

      public ParquetOptions.Builder statisticsEnabled(String statisticsEnabled)
      Set the statistics level (e.g., "none", "chunk", "page").

    • createdBy

      public ParquetOptions.Builder createdBy(String createdBy)
      Set the created_by string in the Parquet metadata.

    • dictionaryEnabled

      public ParquetOptions.Builder dictionaryEnabled(Boolean dictionaryEnabled)
      Enable or disable dictionary encoding.

    • bloomFilterOnWrite

      public ParquetOptions.Builder bloomFilterOnWrite(Boolean bloomFilterOnWrite)
      Enable or disable bloom filter on write.

    • skipArrowMetadata

      public ParquetOptions.Builder skipArrowMetadata(Boolean skipArrowMetadata)
      Skip writing Arrow schema metadata.

    • allowSingleFileParallelism

      public ParquetOptions.Builder allowSingleFileParallelism(Boolean allowSingleFileParallelism)
      Allow single-file parallelism for writing.

    • dataPagesizeLimit

      public ParquetOptions.Builder dataPagesizeLimit(Long dataPagesizeLimit)
      Set the data page size limit in bytes.

    • writeBatchSize

      public ParquetOptions.Builder writeBatchSize(Long writeBatchSize)
      Set the write batch size.

    • dictionaryPageSizeLimit

      public ParquetOptions.Builder dictionaryPageSizeLimit(Long dictionaryPageSizeLimit)
      Set the dictionary page size limit in bytes.

      public ParquetOptions.Builder maxRowGroupSize(Long maxRowGroupSize)
      Set the maximum row group size.

      public ParquetOptions.Builder dataPageRowCountLimit(Long dataPageRowCountLimit)
      Set the data page row count limit.

    • maximumParallelRowGroupWriters

      public ParquetOptions.Builder maximumParallelRowGroupWriters(Long maximumParallelRowGroupWriters)
      Set the maximum parallel row group writers.

      public ParquetOptions.Builder maximumBufferedRecordBatchesPerStream(Long maximumBufferedRecordBatchesPerStream)
      Set the maximum buffered record batches per stream.

      public ParquetOptions.Builder bloomFilterFpp(Double bloomFilterFpp)
      Set the bloom filter false positive probability.

      Set the bloom filter number of distinct values.
